_doc: Curated metadata for scheduled jobs. The cron-collector matches discovered jobs against the entries below by `match` rules and merges the metadata in. Schema mirrors agents/cron-collector/src/inventory.ts.

jobs.name: Vault Lint
jobs.description: Daily SloaneVault link/orphan/staleness lint. Writes a daily report read by the vault-lint skill.

jobs.name: QMD daily update
jobs.description: Re-indexes the SloaneVault qmd corpus so semantic search stays current.

jobs.name: HG outreach scheduler
jobs.description: Drives the cold-email outreach send/throttle loop for hg-outbound.

jobs.name: X-Accel Cron Dispatcher
jobs.description: Multi-function cron dispatcher for the X-Accel social media management app (x.heavisidetechnology.com). Calls /api/cron/* endpoints for publish-scheduled, fast-reply, drip-engage, content-generation, metric snapshots, fact-checks, and weekly reports. All endpoints returning ok:true in logs. Dashboard may classify as failure due to run inference heuristics.
jobs.false_positive_reason: Dashboard run-inference marks this as failure because the script runs every minute and the collector cannot reliably detect individual endpoint outcomes from the combined log. Manual log inspection confirms all endpoints returning ok:true.

jobs.name: Pasco Construction News Ingest
jobs.description: Ingests Pasco county construction news data every 6 hours.

jobs.name: HeavisideOS Cold Email Sync
jobs.description: Rsyncs cold email data from heavisidelinux to apps-vps every 5 minutes. Manual proof passed on 2026-04-27 after Tailscale/SSH reachability recovered.

jobs.name: Infra Dashboard Traefik Route Auto-Healer
jobs.description: Checks if Traefik can route to the infra-dashboard container and restarts it if the route is lost. Replaced the raw crontab row on 2026-04-27; script now discovers the current Coolify container by label.

jobs.name: HG Market Report: Recover Stuck Jobs
jobs.description: Recovers stuck hg-market-report worker jobs every 2 minutes.

jobs.name: HG Market Report: Reconcile Citations
jobs.description: Reconciles citation data for hg-market-report every 10 minutes.

jobs.name: HG Market Report: Process Email Queue
jobs.description: Processes queued outgoing emails for hg-market-report every 5 minutes.

jobs.name: HG Websites Cron
jobs.description: Periodic hg-websites maintenance tasks every 6 hours.

jobs.name: HG Websites Careers Cron
jobs.description: Syncs careers data for hg-websites every 15 minutes.

jobs.name: HG Market Report Routing Update
jobs.description: Updates routing configuration for hg-market-report every minute.

jobs.name: HG SEO Tracking Sweeper
jobs.description: Cleans stale tracking data for HG SEO twice daily.

jobs.name: Knowledge Graph Sync
jobs.description: Syncs knowledge graph data hourly.

jobs.name: Instantly Reply Ingest
jobs.description: Ingests reply data from Instantly.ai cold email platform (3x daily at 8am, 12pm, 5pm).

jobs.name: Instantly Reply Triage
jobs.description: Triage/classify replies from Instantly.ai cold email platform (3x daily).

jobs.name: Instantly Reply Digest
jobs.description: Generates reply digest summaries from Instantly.ai cold email platform (3x daily).

jobs.name: Agency Commander Facebook Ads Sync
jobs.description: Daily Facebook Ads sync for Agency Commander. Runs through a named systemd timer and reads CRON_SECRET from the app's Coolify env file.

jobs.name: Restic Weekly Backup (apps-vps)
jobs.description: Weekly restic backup of apps-vps data. Replaced /etc/cron.d/restic-weekly on 2026-04-27 after restoring disk headroom; old row is paused pending scheduled proof.

jobs.name: TLS Expiry Check
jobs.description: Daily check of TLS certificate expiry with 21-day warning threshold.

jobs.name: Coolify Origin Cert Check
jobs.description: Daily check of Coolify origin certificate expiry with 21-day warning threshold.

jobs.name: Docker Prune
jobs.description: Daily cleanup of unused Docker images, containers, and volumes.

jobs.name: Coolify Queue Once
jobs.description: Coolify internal queue processor run every 30 minutes.

jobs.name: Coolify Build Registry Cert Renewal
jobs.description: Daily renewal check for Coolify build registry TLS certificate.

jobs.name: HG Market Report Health Check
jobs.description: Health check for hg-market-report report generation every 15 minutes.

jobs.name: HG Market Report Worker Health
jobs.description: Health check for hg-market-report worker processes every 5 minutes.

jobs.name: Postgres Daily Backup
jobs.description: Daily Postgres logical backup at 02:00. Replaced the root crontab row on 2026-04-27; the old row is paused pending scheduled proof.

jobs.name: Postgres Restore Drill (paused)
jobs.description: Monthly restore drill. Paused in crontab; replaced by systemd timer postgres-restore-drill.timer.

jobs.name: Agency Financials MV Refresh
jobs.description: Daily refresh of agency financials materialized views in Postgres at 02:30.

jobs.name: Agent Console Retention Cleanup
jobs.description: Daily cleanup of old agent console session data at 04:15.

jobs.name: Restic Weekly Backup (db-vps)
jobs.description: Weekly restic backup of db-vps data. Replaced /etc/cron.d/restic-weekly on 2026-04-27; old row is paused pending scheduled proof.

jobs.name: RocketChat Mongo Backup
jobs.description: Daily MongoDB backup for Rocket.Chat at 03:20. Replaced /etc/cron.d/rocketchat-mongo-backup on 2026-04-27; old row is paused pending scheduled proof.

jobs.name: WAL-G Basebackup Push
jobs.description: Weekly WAL-G physical base backup push to remote storage. Replaced /etc/cron.d/walg_basebackup_push on 2026-04-27; old row is paused pending scheduled proof.

jobs.name: Logical Restore Check (paused)
jobs.description: Monthly logical restore verification. Paused in cron.d; replaced by systemd timer postgres-logical-restore-check.timer.

jobs.name: Restore Drill Monitor (paused)
jobs.description: Daily restore drill freshness monitor. Paused in cron.d; replaced by systemd timer postgres-restore-drill-monitor.timer.

jobs.name: WAL-G Basebackup Monitor (paused)
jobs.description: Daily WAL-G base backup freshness monitor. Paused in cron.d; replaced by systemd timer postgres-walg-basebackup-monitor.timer.

jobs.name: Static Route (reboot)
jobs.description: Restores static routes at boot.

jobs.name: GHL ↔ Meta lead sync
jobs.description: Syncs lead data between GoHighLevel and Meta Ads via Bitwarden Secrets-Manager-loaded creds.

jobs.name: open-agents log rotation
jobs.description: Rotates Hermes / open-agents log directories to keep disk usage bounded.

jobs.name: PBN domain pipeline
jobs.description: Daily PBN domain enrichment + reporting run.

jobs.name: Guardrail review reminder
jobs.description: Daily reminder check for SloaneVault guardrail items needing review.

jobs.name: uv age-gate refresh
jobs.description: Refreshes the uv package age-gate cache (npm release-age guardrail).

jobs.name: Agency financials sync
jobs.description: Daily refresh of Stripe / GHL / ad-platform revenue + spend feeds for agency-financials.

jobs.name: logrotate (system)
jobs.description: OS-level log rotation across /var/log.

jobs.name: Restic backup
jobs.description: Daily restic snapshot of important directories on this host.

jobs.name: SMART weekly disk check
jobs.description: smartctl long self-test of the system disk.

jobs.name: OS auto-update
jobs.description: Weekly unattended apt-upgrade.

jobs.name: Filesystem TRIM
jobs.description: Weekly fstrim across SSD-backed filesystems.

jobs.name: Firmware update refresh
jobs.description: fwupd metadata pull (system firmware update catalog).
jobs.false_positive_reason: fwupdmgr exits code 2 when metadata is already current. This is not a failure -- it means no firmware updates are available. All 4 hosts show the same behavior.

jobs.name: Anacron dispatcher
jobs.description: Runs missed periodic jobs (cron.{daily,weekly,monthly}).

jobs.name: Apport autoreport
jobs.description: Ubuntu crash reporter daily summary.

jobs.name: dpkg DB backup
jobs.description: Snapshots /var/lib/dpkg/status before package operations.

jobs.name: ext4 scrub
jobs.description: Online ext4 metadata consistency check.

jobs.name: etckeeper auto-commit
jobs.description: Tracks /etc changes in a local git repo.

jobs.name: journal vacuum
jobs.description: Bounds the systemd journal disk usage.

jobs.name: man-db rebuild
jobs.description: Rebuilds the man-page index.

jobs.name: MOTD news
jobs.description: Refreshes the dynamic message-of-the-day banner.

jobs.name: snapd repair
jobs.description: Snap package self-heal check.

jobs.name: sysstat collect
jobs.description: Per-10-minute system performance metric capture.

jobs.name: sysstat summary
jobs.description: Daily summary of sysstat-collected metrics.

jobs.name: system health check
jobs.description: OEM health check service.

jobs.name: tmpfiles clean
jobs.description: Cleans /tmp and other tmpfiles.d-managed directories.

jobs.name: Ubuntu Advantage refresh
jobs.description: Ubuntu Pro/UA subscription metadata refresh.

jobs.name: update-notifier download
jobs.description: Pulls package metadata for the desktop update notifier.

jobs.name: update-notifier MOTD
jobs.description: Refreshes the update banner shown at login.

jobs.name: system run-parts: cron.daily
jobs.description: Dispatcher in /etc/crontab that runs everything in /etc/cron.daily (skipped if anacron is running).

jobs.name: system run-parts: cron.weekly
jobs.description: Dispatcher in /etc/crontab that runs everything in /etc/cron.weekly (skipped if anacron is running).

jobs.name: system run-parts: cron.monthly
jobs.description: Dispatcher in /etc/crontab that runs everything in /etc/cron.monthly (skipped if anacron is running).

jobs.name: system run-parts: cron.hourly
jobs.description: Dispatcher in /etc/crontab that runs everything in /etc/cron.hourly.

jobs.name: sysstat (cron.d)
jobs.description: 10-minute sysstat sample + nightly rotation entries.

jobs.name: anacron retry (cron.d)
jobs.description: Retries missed anacron jobs hourly.

jobs.name: ext4 scrub (cron.d)
jobs.description: Cron-driven ext4 scrub fallback (in addition to the systemd timer).
